_comment: Species: Destiny Beast (命兽) from Beyond the Timescape. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Destiny Beast

canonical.appearance: Beast of living destiny 5 m, body is woven fate-threads, eyes see all possible futures
canonical.size: 5 m adult, 0 jin (fate); true form spans destinies
canonical.behavior: Cultivates by absorbing destiny; appears at fate-defining moments
canonical.relationships: Neutral; observed by all cultivators at breakthroughs
canonical.bloodline: Destiny lineage; destiny-attribute bloodline (one of the rarest)
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: destiny_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
